description: 粗黑边框+高饱和色块+超大字。远距离可读性极强，HTML渲染稳定。企业内训专家级风格。

typography.family: Bold sans-serif (Helvetica Neue Bold, Arial Black)

base_style_prompt: Neo-Brutalism design. Cream (#F5E6D3) 40%, revolution red (#FF3B4F) 25%, gold (#FFD700) 20%, deep black (#1A1A1A) 15%. Thick black borders (4-6px) on all important elements. High-saturation color blocks with clear boundaries. Super-large typography (3-6vw) — title occupies 15-30% of slide area. Sans-serif bold fonts. Offset shadow (8px 8px, solid black). Flat geometric icons with borders. NO gradients.
implementation_notes: 无需AI生成图像——纯CSS即可完美实现。Path A推荐。CSS简单，无复杂SVG，渲染成功率接近100%。
